prompts.name: Close Shy Portrait
prompts.text: Use a close portrait framing with a shy expression, soft blush, gentle eye contact, and a simple supportive background.

prompts.name: Full Outfit Showcase
prompts.text: Use full-body framing with clear posture, readable footwear, visible outfit details, and balanced background.

prompts.name: Low Hero Pose
prompts.text: Use a low-angle hero composition with confident posture, strong silhouette, and dramatic but readable lighting.

prompts.name: Window Sitting Portrait
prompts.text: Pose the subject sitting near a window with soft natural light, relaxed posture, and thoughtful atmosphere.

prompts.name: Walking City Shot
prompts.text: Show the subject walking through a city environment with natural motion, urban detail, and balanced framing.

prompts.name: Running Action Shot
prompts.text: Capture the subject running with motion cues, dynamic angle, flowing clothing, and clear direction.

prompts.name: Over Shoulder Story Shot
prompts.text: Use an over-the-shoulder angle to create a narrative interaction or discovery moment.

prompts.name: Cafe Close Moment
prompts.text: Frame the subject in a cozy café close-up with warm lighting, drink props, and gentle expression.

prompts.name: Rooftop Wide Shot
prompts.text: Use wide framing on a rooftop with city depth, wind, and strong environmental scale.

prompts.name: Magic Full Body
prompts.text: Use full-body framing for a magic pose with readable gesture, glowing effects, and clear silhouette.

prompts.name: Rain Reflection Shot
prompts.text: Use wet reflective ground, rainy mood, and subject-focused framing for a cinematic scene.

prompts.name: Flower Field Portrait
prompts.text: Use portrait framing in a flower field with soft depth, petals, and gentle natural light.

prompts.name: Train Station Moment
prompts.text: Frame the subject at a train station with travel atmosphere, platform detail, and emotional pause.

prompts.name: Soft Bedroom Portrait
prompts.text: Use a soft bedroom setting with cozy textures, gentle light, and natural relaxed pose.

prompts.name: Backlit Silhouette
prompts.text: Use backlighting to create a strong silhouette while keeping face or key details readable.
